eyebrow: An experiment in building software with AI agents
headline: Software you can watch grow.
disclaimer: An honest heads-up: this site was written by AI agents. storytree is a one-person project right now — I'm a solo dev and a dad to a 3-year-old, short on spare hours and no great writer, so I've leaned on the very tools I'm building to put it into words and min-max the time I've got. The ideas are mine; the prose is the machine's.
lede: Building with AI agents is fast — and a blur. The code writes itself; the hard part is seeing what it built, trusting it, and keeping humans and agents pointed the same way. storytree turns a project into a living map.
